
```tsx
function App(props) {
  const { data, config, onAction } = props;

  const [value, setValue] = React.useState(data?.value || 0);
  const [trend, setTrend] = React.useState(data?.trend || null);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (data?.value !== undefined) {
      setValue(data.value);
    }
    if (data?.trend !== undefined) {
      setTrend(data.trend);
    }
  }, [data]);

  const title = config?.title || "Stat Card";
  const unit = config?.unit || "";
  const format = config?.format || "number";
  const trendColor = config?.trendColor || "var(--color-accent)";

  const formatValue = (val) => {
    if (format === "percentage") {
      return `${val}%`;
    }
    if (format === "currency") {
      return `$${val.toLocaleString()}`;
    }
    return val.toLocaleString();
  };

  const handleClick = () => {
    if (onAction) {
      onAction({ type: "stat-clicked", value });
    }
  };

  const trendIcon = trend > 0 ? "↑" : trend < 0 ? "↓" : "→";
  const trendClass = trend > 0 ? "positive" : trend < 0 ? "negative" : "neutral";

  return (
    <div
      style={{
        backgroundColor: "var(--color-surface)",
        color: "var(--color-text)",
        padding: "24px",
        borderRadius: "8px",
        cursor: "pointer",
        transition: "transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s",
        border: "1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)",
      }}
      onClick={handleClick}
      onMouseEnter={(e) => {
        e.currentTarget.style.transform = "translateY(-2px)";
        e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow =
          "0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)";
      }}
      onMouseLeave={(e) => {
        e.currentTarget.style.transform = "translateY(0)";
        e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = "none";
      }}
    >
      <div
        style={{
          fontSize: "14px",
          fontWeight: "500",
          opacity: 0.7,
          marginBottom: "8px",
          textTransform: "uppercase",
          letterSpacing: "0.5px",
        }}
      >
        {title}
      </div>

      <div
        style={{
          display: "flex",
          alignItems: "baseline",
          gap: "8px",
          marginBottom: "12px",
        }}
      >
        <div
          style={{
            fontSize: "28px",
            fontWeight: "700",
            lineHeight: "1",
          }}
        >
          {formatValue(value)}
        </div>
        {unit && (
          <div
            style={{
              fontSize: "14px",
              opacity: 0.6,
            }}
          >
            {unit}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {trend !== null && (
        <div
          style={{
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "center",
            gap: "4px",
            fontSize: "12px",
            color: trendColor,
            fontWeight: "600",
          }}
          className={trendClass}
        >
          <span>{trendIcon}</span>
          <span>{Math.abs(trend)}% {trend > 0 ? "increase" : trend < 0 ? "decrease" : "no change"}</span>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

export default App;
```
